# fleetdm_script (Data Source)

Fetches a FleetDM script by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get a specific script by ID
data "fleetdm_script" "security_check" {
  id = 1
}

output "script_name" {
  value = data.fleetdm_script.security_check.name
}

output "script_created" {
  value = data.fleetdm_script.security_check.created_at
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the script.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) When the script was created.
- `name` (String) The name of the script.
- `team_id` (Number) The ID of the team this script belongs to. Null for global scripts.
- `updated_at` (String) When the script was last updated.
